rulings.Case Title: ERIC BOICE et al VS. HARCOURT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILIT et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFs ERIC BOICE, VINETTA BOICE and YOWIE STROMBERG's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff may file a First Amended Complaint. However, the Court denies the request to shorten time for Defendant to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC BOICE et al VS. HARCOURT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILIT et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration, Pursuant To Ccp 1008(A) And 473(B), Of The Courts March 4, 2015, Order Denying Plaintiffs Motion For Class Certification With Prejudice And Without Leave To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFs ERIC BOICE, VINETTA BOICE and YOWIE STROMBERG's Motion For Reconsideration, Pursuant To Ccp 1008(A) And 473(B), Of The Courts March 4, 2015 DENIED. No new facts or circumstances are presented with the motion to justify reconsideration of the Court's prior Order. Any facts based on the filing of a new complaint are by definition unripe as the complaint has not yet been filed. Plaintiffs may bring a second motion for class certification after the amendment of their complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claims For Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees In Plaintiffs First Amended
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SUTTON Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claims For Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees In Plaintiffs First Amended CONTINUED to Wednesday, April 22, 2015. Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint, in violation of Local Rule 2.6B. Furthermore, the opposing party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the opposition. Both parties shall provide courtesy copies of all their papers with cover pages reflecting the new hearing date by April 15, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SUTTON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to Wednesday, April 22, 2015. Moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the First Amended Complaint, in violation of Local Rule 2.6B. Furthermore, the opposing party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the opposition. Both parties shall provide courtesy copies of all their papers with cover pages reflecting the new hearing date by April 15, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 744 UNION PARTNERS, LLC VS. 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANTs 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC and PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS, LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED. No opposition was filed, and judgment was granted in Defendants' favor on March 12, 2015. However, the Court finds that $4582.50 is not a reasonable fee for bringing the motion. The Court awards $1000 in fees and costs instead, as a reasonable fee for the bringing the motion, given the judgment in Defendants' favor. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A MENDAROS VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, SUCCESS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH MAGUIRE VS. JOSEPH CONNELLY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH MAGUIRE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. The Order of April 6, 2015 deems admitted the entirety of the allegations of Plaintiff's complaint. Accordingly, Plaintiff is entitled to summary judgment as a matter of law. Plaintiff to provide a proposed order and judgment to the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT BRIAN JOSEPH's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. Declaration of process server establishes sufficient personal service on Defendant Joseph. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK GIN VS. SANJEEV RAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 13, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT SANJEEV RAI's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Hearing Required on Defendant's Motion to Quash. Defendant failed to provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint, in violation of Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant shall provide such a courtesy copy at the time of the hearing. = (501/REQ)
